steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase naming the International Criminal Police Organization explains Interpol. It is opened with an em dash, so the appositive should be closed before the sentence continues.

steps.title: Match the opening dash
steps.content: B uses a colon, C provides no closing punctuation, and D mismatches the opening em dash with a comma. The matching choice closes the appositive with a second em dash. The answer is A.
